content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be repurposed to resolve a longstanding flaw in curiosity-driven reinforcement learning: the stagnation of intrinsic reward from repeated exposure to novel-but-static environments. By leveraging the episodic memory compression and selective querying architectures from cutting-edge active learning agent memory, intrinsic reward modules like ICM and RND can actively prioritize unlearned novel environmental fragments instead of discounting all familiar regions.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
